"Better drop to your knees and bark like you want it." (Above quote is from Bark Like You Want It by Sir Mix-A-Lot).

Guys, guys! I swear that I just woke up and he was already here. You've gotta believe me- But you guys loved this man and Imma be so fr, I kind of already had this prompt brewing in my sick lil head during the og bot. So I thought might as well bring it into existence and put it out into the equally sick world!! (If this flops I will actually sob)

ART IS NOT MINE!! I couldn't find the artist, however if you know who it is, do let me know :))

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too. !!Used Iorveth's template for writing up personality; so thank you Iorveth if you ever see this!!
